verdict_meaning.FAIL: Treatment has no clinical relationship to the diagnosis — likely a hallucination

dx_tx_match.analysis: Requested treatment is plausible for the stated diagnosis.

insurer_voice.analysis: Denial letter uses plausible insurer register.

denial_logic.analysis: No internal logical contradictions detected beyond intentional denial flaws.

verdict_meaning.PASS: Dates/timestamps are plausible
verdict_meaning.FAIL: Dates/timestamps are inconsistent or impossible

date_sanity.analysis: No timestamps present to validate; no contradictions detected.

citation_traceability.analysis: Citation traceability not enforced in this offline prompt pass; intentional guideline vagueness allowed.

verdict_meaning.PASS: Case is within scope
verdict_meaning.FAIL: Case is out of scope for Aegis MVP

scope_guard.analysis: Case stays within commercial plan scope.

verdict_meaning.PASS: No PHI or sensitive personal data present
verdict_meaning.FAIL: PHI or sensitive data detected

safety_redactor.analysis: No PHI patterns detected in visible text fields.

verification_results.evidence: Not fully machine-verified in this batch pass.
No external review / IRO notice language present.

score_meaning.1: One or more intended flaws are absent — P4 failed to inject them
score_meaning.3: Flaws partially present or ambiguous — some injection may have been diluted
score_meaning.5: All intended flaws verified present in the denial letter

arbiter.reason: All Tier 1 gates pass; no Tier 2 critic failed.
